title: container create: os/arch check
body:
Unless explicitely overridden, check the image's OS and architecture
and throw an errors in case of a mismatch.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Inspired by a recent blog post from @fatherlinux: http://crunchtools.com/deeply-understanding-the-different-between-portability-compatibility-and-supportability/

We're now throwing meaningful errors instead of the rather cryptic one trying to access paths on the root fs.

Code LGTM

On Wed, Nov 13, 2019, 08:13 Valentin Rothberg <notifications@github.com>
